description: A horizontal solid-blue announcement card in DHS official branding. The background is a flat medium-blue. Centered-left in white serif type reads 'Secretary Mayorkas Outlines National Priorities for Critical Infrastructure Security and Resilience for Next Two Years.' To the right is the white line-art version of the official DHS (U.S. Department of Homeland Security) circular seal with eagle. A thin red horizontal rule runs across the lower-middle of the image, beneath which large white/grey bold sans-serif text reads 'PRESS RELEASE.' This is a standardized DHS press-release title-card template used to accompany policy announcements on social media; it is a designed graphic but a plain bureaucratic announcement card rather than a meme or persuasion/propaganda image. Target audience is press and the general public.
notable_text: Secretary Mayorkas Outlines National Priorities for Critical Infrastructure Security and Resilience for Next Two Years; PRESS RELEASE
